Components
All ComponentsApp ShellSidebar & TreeToolbarCanvas & PreviewAddon PanelControlsDocs PanelStatus BarStory Card

Components FantasyUI

A Bootstrap component-workshop theme with story trees, preview canvases, addon controls, docs panels, and quality dashboards.

Story Workspace

A three-column shell for component trees, isolated previews, and documentation.

Addon Controls

Bottom panel patterns for args, actions, source, and accessibility checks.

Starter Templates

Multiple ready-made views for docs, workshops, tests, and addon labs.

Primary Preview

The product preview lives at product/index.html and mirrors the symbolic sketch.

View starters
Docs ready Components FantasyUI
